original_statement: how many of the tallest freestanding structures exist in russia?
mutated_statement: how many of the tallest things exist in that place?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Locative vagueness + Attribute deletion: "freestanding structures" → "things" (specific category → generic hypernym) | "freestanding" removed (qualifier deleted) | "Russia" → "that place" (named location → vague deictic reference)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容：“The only place explicitly referenced as ‘that place’ in the table is ‘today France’… so ‘that place’ refers to France.” Agent直接将“that place”判定为France并给出具体答案（3）。在judge_thought或日志中未见对问题模糊性的承认、未使用模糊、不确定或需要澄清等表述，也未向用户反问或请求更多信息。鉴于其未识别或未标注原问题的地点和范畴模糊，而是把含糊指代当作明确信息处理，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
